quality_highlights: common-issues.md: exemplary multi-layer structure with GHES error table, cause/solution format, callouts

single_file_improvements.issue: Oracle/mystical messages ('The ancient spirits stir...', 'The prophecy is fulfilled...', 'The oracle requires further meditation...') — run-failure provides no actionable guidance
run-failure 'Reading interrupted! ... The document remains unsummarized...' is non-actionable and colloquial
